description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style metal shelving unit with a rectangular frame and multiple horizontal surfaces for storage. The structure is composed of square metal tubing, providing both support and open visibility from all sides. The shelving is divided into several sections, with some areas featuring partial cutouts or open slots, likely for accommodating larger or irregularly shaped items. The base is reinforced with additional crossbars and wide, flat feet for stability on hard surfaces. The overall finish is a matte, light gray, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The open design allows for easy access and visibility of stored items from any angle.
description: A sturdy, open-frame metal shelving unit with multiple flat surfaces and partial cutouts, finished in matte gray. Its industrial design is ideal for urban storage or utility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with visible horizontal surfaces and partial cutouts on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the arrangement of the cutouts on the upper right section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open frame and the left-side cutouts, with crossbars visible underneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left-side cutouts and the overall symmetry of the shelving sections.
